impact: The daemon was selecting validator implementation tasks while the syntax-first test still required validator_status() to remain an import-only sentinel with validator_ready: False. This repair parks the failed retries and adds a narrower next task that preserves the sentinel helper exactly while adding validator behavior through separate functions.
summary: Update PP&D supervisor planning to stop retrying the public source inventory validator against an unchanged sentinel-status expectation.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 3 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-67: Add the public source inventory validator only after the syntax-first import test and one-unsafe-field fixture pass, covering allowlisted hosts, private DevHub paths, raw response bodies, downloaded documents, credentials, traces, screenshots, and required provenance fields.; Task checkbox-68: Restore the public source inventory syntax sentinel only: replace `ppd/contracts/public_source_inventory.py` as needed to preserve `MODULE_PURPOSE` and existing import-guard expectations before any validator behavior changes.; Task checkbox-70: Retry the public source inventory validator as a one-file implementation only after the `MODULE_PURPOSE` sentinel and expected unsafe-field fixture path pass validation.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
